name: Response Agent — Thing Reference Accuracy
description: Golden dataset: response agent must include a valid JSON block referencing Things from applied_changes with correct IDs.

eval_cases.description: Single thing updated. JSON block must reference it with correct ID.

input.reasoning_summary: Updated 'Q2 Sprint Planning' with new notes.

rubric: The JSON block contains a 'referenced_things' key
The referenced_things list includes an entry with thing_id 'thing-spr01'

eval_cases.description: Thing created. JSON block must reference it or be empty (since created things may not have IDs in context yet — empty list is acceptable).

input.user_message: add budget review to my tasks

rubric: The JSON block contains a 'referenced_things' key with a valid JSON array (may be empty if no ID was in context)

eval_cases.description: No changes applied. JSON block should have empty referenced_things.

input.reasoning_summary: No changes. User is checking in with no specific action needed.

rubric: The referenced_things list is empty (no things to reference when there are no changes)
